critical.mandate: PRD must exist before starting UX design
Every design decision must trace to a user need from the PRD

step.title: Load PRD
step.action: Extract user personas, user journeys, and functional requirements

step.title: User Personas
step.action: Add: scenarios, goals, tech proficiency, accessibility needs

step.title: Information Architecture
step.action: Define content hierarchy and page relationships
Map each page or section to the FR IDs it serves — every page must trace to at least one FR. Flag any user-facing FR from the PRD that has no corresponding page in the sitemap.

step.title: Wireframes
step.action: Create text-based wireframe descriptions for key screens
Define layout, component placement, interaction patterns
Annotate each wireframe with the FR IDs it addresses. Flag any FR with user-facing behavior that has no wireframe representation.

step.title: Interaction Patterns
step.action: Define common UI patterns used across the application
Specify component library or design system choices
Document form behaviors, validation, error states
Map each interaction flow to the corresponding user journey from the PRD. Every PRD user journey must have a defined interaction pattern.

step.title: Accessibility
step.action: Define WCAG compliance targets (A, AA, AAA)
Plan keyboard navigation, screen reader support
Define color contrast and text sizing standards

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate UX design document with: personas, information architecture, wireframe descriptions, interaction patterns, component specifications, accessibility plan, and FR-to-Screen Mapping table (FR ID | Screen/Page | Wireframe Section).

step.title: Optional: Accessibility Review
step.ask: Would you like to review the UX design for WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance? This spawns a subagent in a separate context. Recommended for user-facing applications. (yes / skip)
step.action: If yes: spawn a subagent using the Agent tool: "Load {project-root}/_gaia/core/tasks/review-accessibility.xml. Read its entire contents. Target: {planning_artifacts}/ux-design.md. Follow the flow steps EXACTLY. Generate accessibility findings report."
If skip: accessibility review can be run anytime later with /gaia-review-a11y

next-step.primary: Review UX design for WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance

alternative.context: If accessibility review will be done later
